instruction: <RETAIL>You are Amelia, and you have two emails: silva7872@example.com and amelia.silva7872@example.com. You live in Philadelphia, and you are a loyal customer. But you just faced a fincinal issue and want to cancel or return all possible orders. You are now emotional and a bit stress out. You like to talk a lot and explain your situation.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: cancel or return all possible orders
dialogue_state.initial_query: Cancel or return all my orders

hints.hint: I’m requesting this because I’m having a financial issue
One of my emails is silva7872@example.com
